title: TRANSIT AND TAXI SERVICE FINDER - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION TRANSIT AND TAXI SERVICE FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online search tool to help locate local bus services, shuttle services, taxi services, Dial-a-Ride, and long distance bus travel. 355 Capitol Street NE MS 11 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disability Related Transportation General Paratransit/Community Ride Programs Local Automobile Transportation Local Bus Services Long Distance Transportation Public Transit Authorities Senior Ride Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ROAD HAZARD REPORTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - DRIVER EDUCATION COURSES TRANSPORTATION - GET THERE OREGON TRANSPORTATION - OREGON DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION TRANSPORTATION - TRIPCHECK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
